title: 10 best herbal creams for fluid retention

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Canada thistle creams helps with fluid retention because they contain silymarin, a flavonoid compound that has been shown to improve lymphatic circulation and reduce swelling. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid buildup. Additionally, Canada thistle creams may help to promote the removal of excess fluids through increased urine production, further alleviating symptoms of water retention. Overall, this natural remedy provides a safe and effective way to alleviate fluid retention and related discomforts.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Canadian thistle creams help reduce fluid retention by increasing urine production, allowing excess water and electrolytes to be eliminated from the body.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Canadian thistle creams have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with fluid retention, making it easier for the body to manage excess fluids.

Sodium-reducing properties: Canadian thistle creams contain compounds that can help regulate sodium levels in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention. By reducing sodium absorption, these creams help reduce fluid buildup in the tissues and promote healthy blood pressure.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Canada thistle plant contain saponins, which are known to have diuretic properties, making them effective in reducing fluid retention.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes, also known as underground stems, contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of water retention.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried cirsium arvense flowers 500g and organic beeswax 100g.
Combine the dried flowers with carrier oil sweet almond oil 200ml at room temperature stirring gently.
Steep the mixture in a warm dark place for 4 hours to infuse the oils with plant compounds.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean glass container discarding solids and set aside.
Melt the beeswax and infused oil together in a double boiler at 60°c temperature until smooth and creamy.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow creams helps with fluid retention because they contain saponins, a type of natural compound that acts as a diuretic. Saponins help to reduce water retention by increasing urine production and improving kidney function. Additionally, marshmallow creams have anti-inflammatory properties that can alleviate swelling and discomfort associated with fluid retention. By reducing inflammation and promoting healthy digestion, herbal marshmallow creams can provide relief from fluid retention and promote overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: Marshmallow creams contain mucilage, a thick, protective substance that soothes and lubricates the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and irritation caused by excess fluids in the body.
Saponins: Herbal marshmallow creams are rich in saponins, a type of triterpene that helps to reduce water retention by increasing urine production and improving kidney function.
Astringent properties: Marshmallow creams have astringent properties, which help to tighten and shrink swollen tissues, reducing the appearance of puffiness and fluid buildup in the body.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the marshmallow plant contain a high concentration of mucilage, which helps to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin, making them ideal for treating fluid retention.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the underground stems that store nutrients and water, allowing them to be used as a natural demulcent to protect and lubricate the skin, alleviating symptoms of fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of dried marshmallow root (althaea officinalis) from a trusted supplier and sift through it to remove any debris or impurities.
Combine the sifted marshmallow root with 100 ml of sweet almond oil in a heat-resistant glass beaker and heat gently over low heat for 30 minutes.
Remove the mixture from the heat and let it steep for an additional 4-6 hours allowing the active compounds to infuse into the oil.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container discarding the solids and reserve the resulting infusion oil for later use.

Mix 100 grams of beeswax, 30 grams of coconut oil, and 30 ml of the reserved infusion oil in a double boiler and heat until the beeswax is fully melted stirring occasionally then pour into a sterilized container to cool and solidify.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle creams helps with fluid retention because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling in the body. Nettle's diuretic properties also stimulate the kidneys to eliminate excess water and sodium, promoting a healthy balance of fluids within the body. Additionally, nettle's ability to relax the blood vessels helps to reduce edema and ease discomfort associated with fluid buildup. By addressing the root causes of fluid retention, stinging nettle creams provide effective relief from bloating, stiffness, and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Stinging nettle cream contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which help reduce swelling and inflammation caused by fluid retention.
Antioxidants: Nettle's antioxidants, such as vitamin C and beta-carotene, neutralize free radicals that can contribute to fluid buildup in the body and improve overall circulation.
Diuretic properties: Stinging nettle has been traditionally used as a natural diuretic, helping to increase urine production and promote the elimination of excess fluids from the body.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and edema associated with fluid retention.
Seeds: The seeds contain omega-3 fatty acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to alleviate swelling caused by fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Gather 100 grams of dried urtica dioica leaves and stems from a reputable source for processing.
Combine 50 grams of dried plant material with 500 milliliters of distilled water in a stainless steel pot for maceration.
Simmer the mixture at low heat for 30 minutes to extract active compounds and essential oils from the herb.
Strain the resulting liquid through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container discarding solids after 10 minutes.
Mix 200 grams of petroleum jelly with 100 milliliters of the urtica dioica infusion and heat at 65 degrees celsius for 30 minutes to create a smooth cream.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Field horsetail creams helps with fluid retention because they contain high levels of silica, a mineral that plays a crucial role in maintaining healthy connective tissue. When applied topically, silica-rich field horsetail creams can help to strengthen and tone the tissues, reducing swelling and inflammation caused by excess fluid buildup. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of field horsetail can help to alleviate pain and discomfort associated with fluid retention, making it an effective natural remedy for this common issue.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Horsetail contains flavonoids, which increase urine production and help remove excess water from the body, reducing fluid retention.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The antioxidants in horsetail cream reduce inflammation and swelling, alleviating the discomfort associated with fluid retention and other related conditions like edema.
Sodium and potassium balancing properties: Horsetail's mineral content helps regulate sodium and potassium levels in the body, which can help balance water retention and reduce swelling.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silicon, which helps to reduce water retention and inflammation, making them ideal for treating fluid retention.
Rhyzomes: Containing compounds that have diuretic properties, rhyzomes help to increase urine production and relieve symptoms of fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried equisetum arvense plant material in the ratio of one part herb to two parts carrier oil.
Chop the harvested equisetum arvense into small pieces and combine with 300ml of cold-pressed sunflower oil.
Allow the mixture to steep for 14 days under refrigeration at a temperature range of 4°c to 6°c.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to separate the herbal extract from the carrier oil.
Mix the extracted herbal liquid with 20g of beeswax and 10ml of sweet almond oil, then heat the mixture at 60°c for 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with fluid retention because they contain diuretic properties that stimulate the kidneys to increase urine production, thereby reducing excess fluid buildup in the body. The cream's active ingredients, such as taraxasterol and taraxadiol, help to reduce inflammation and congestion, which can contribute to fluid retention. Additionally, dandelion creams may also help to improve lymphatic circulation, allowing the body to more efficiently remove waste and toxins that can contribute to swelling and bloating.
remedy_properties: Diuretic Properties: Dandelion root and leaves contain compounds that stimulate urine production, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate swelling. This is due to the presence of taraxasterol, a triterpene saponin that increases urine flow.

Anti-Inflammatory Compounds: The flavonoids and terpenes present in dandelion extracts have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce edema (swelling) caused by fluid retention. This is because these compounds inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory molecules and enzymes.

Choleretic Properties: Dandelion root has been shown to increase bile production and flow, which can help reduce water retention in the body. This is achieved through the stimulation of the gallbladder to release more bile into the small intestine, which aids digestion and absorbs excess fluids.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in inulin, a natural diuretic that helps reduce water retention and promote urinary flow.
Rhyzomes: Contain sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate swelling caused by fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh taraxacum officinale leaves and flowers in the morning for optimal potency and freshness.
Dry the herb mixture using a food dehydrator at 30°c for 4-6 hours or sun drying for 24 hours.
Combine 200g of dried herbs with 1000ml of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil or coconut oil in a glass jar.
Infuse the herbal blend in the carrier oil under warm temperature for 2 weeks, shaking the mixture daily, and filter it using cheesecloth.
Add 20% beeswax to the infused oil and heat it gently until melted, then pour into sterilized containers for cream preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe creams helps with fluid retention because of its natural anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The aloe vera gel in these creams has been shown to improve circulation, reduce swelling, and promote lymphatic drainage, all of which can help alleviate water retention. Additionally, the cream's ability to soothe and calm the skin can also contribute to reduced fluid buildup by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy blood flow. As a result, using herbal aloe creams may provide relief from fluid retention symptoms such as bloating, puffiness, and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds: Reduce swelling and edema caused by fluid retention, making it easier for the body to process excess fluids.
Anthraquinones: Help to improve digestion and reduce water retention by stimulating bowel movements and preventing constipation.
Vasodilatory effects of aloe gel: Dilate blood vessels, reducing pressure on the kidneys and allowing them to excrete excess fluid more efficiently.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, aloe vera leaves are used to create creams that help reduce swelling and alleviate fluid retention symptoms.
Rhyzomes: The underground stem of the aloe plant, rhyzomes contain saponins and other bioactive compounds that help regulate water balance and reduce edema.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and wash aloe vera leaves weighing approximately 500g under running water.
Extract the gel from the washed aloe vera leaves using a juicer or blender and strain through cheesecloth.
Combine 100g of the extracted aloe vera gel with 20g of dried dandelion root powder in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Add 30ml of sweet almond oil and 10ml of beeswax to the mixture, heating gently over low heat until fully melted and well combined.
Pour the mixture into sterilized glass jars and allow it to cool and solidify at room temperature for approximately 30 minutes before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower creams helps with fluid retention because they contain natural anti-inflammatory compounds that target the root cause of excess water buildup in the body. The cream's active ingredients, such as triterpenoids and flavonoids, work to reduce inflammation in the tissues, allowing fluids to circulate more efficiently and reducing swelling in the body. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: Purple coneflower cream reduces inflammation, which helps alleviate symptoms of fluid retention by decreasing swelling and discomfort.
Diuretic properties: The herbal extract in purple coneflower cream stimulates the kidneys to increase urine production, helping to remove excess fluids and reduce water retention.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in purple coneflower cream help protect the body against oxidative stress, which can contribute to fluid retention by improving blood vessel health and reducing inflammation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help reduce inflammation and alleviate swelling associated with fluid retention.
Rhyzomes: Contains saponins and other bioactive compounds that aid in diuretic properties, helping to eliminate excess fluids from the body.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried echinacea purpurea flowers and leaves in sufficient quantity for preparation.
Combine 20 grams of chopped fresh or dried echinacea with 100 milliliters of cold-pressed sweet almond oil in a glass jar.
Infuse the mixture by placing the jar in a warm water bath at 65°c for 30 minutes, then allowing it to cool and steep overnight.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another container, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid.

Combine the infused oil with 100 grams of beeswax pellets and 20 grams of cocoa butter in a double boiler, heating until melted and blending thoroughly, then pouring into molds to set for at least 30 minutes before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Comfrey creams helps with fluid retention because they contain allantoin, a natural compound that has been shown to improve skin elasticity and reduce inflammation. Mucilage: Forms a protective barrier on the skin's surface, trapping excess moisture and preventing it from being reabsorbed into the body, thereby reducing fluid retention.
Tannins: Have a diuretic effect, which can help to increase urine production and eliminate excess fluids in the body, thereby reducing water retention.
remedy_parts: Roots: Comfrey roots have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing swelling and water retention.
Stems: The stems of the comfrey plant contain a high concentration of allantoin, a natural compound that helps to reduce edema and promote healthy skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh symphytum officinale leaves and flowers in the morning after dew has evaporated.
Combine 100g of dried herb with 500ml of cold-pressed olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Place the mixture in a dark place at room temperature for 4 weeks to allow infusing.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container.
Mix 100g of beeswax with 200ml of coconut oil and slowly add to the herbal oil blend stirring until emulsified.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with fluid retention because of its unique combination of anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as calendula extract, help to reduce swelling and ease discomfort caused by excess fluid buildup. Additionally, the astringent properties help to constrict blood vessels and tighten skin tissues, further reducing water retention. remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh calendula flowers at dawn when the dew is still present.
Dry the harvested calendula flowers in a warm, well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Combine 20% dried calendula flowers with 80% sweet almond oil and beeswax in a heatproof bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally until the wax has melted completely.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into clean glass jars and allow to cool before labeling.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh plantago major leaves measure out 100 grams and dry them in shade for 24 hours.
Combine dried leaves with 200 milliliters of boiling water let it steep for 30 minutes then strain.
Mix the infused plant material with 500 milliliters of cooled coconut oil heat the mixture at low temperature until dissolved.
Add 20 grams of beeswax and 10 milliliters of vitamin e oil to the herbal infusion blend and melt.
Pour the cream base into sterilized containers let it cool and harden for 30 minutes before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Coca creams helps with fluid retention because they contain natural diuretic properties that stimulate the kidneys to eliminate excess water from the body. The herbs present in these creams, such as St. John's Wort and chamomile, have a gentle yet effective ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pressure on joints and muscles caused by fluid buildup. This results in improved circulation, reduced inflammation, and a sense of relief for those experiencing bloating, edema, or water retention.

Marshmallow root (Althaea officinalis): The mucilages in marshmallow root help soothe and calm irritated tissues, reducing inflammation and swelling associated with fluid retention.

The cream contains compounds that help to reduce swelling and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid buildup. Diuretic: The herb extract in bishop's weed cream can stimulate urine production and increase the frequency of urination, helping to remove excess fluids from the body.
Antispasmodic: Bishop's weed's antispasmodic properties can help relax the smooth muscles in the kidneys and urinary tract, reducing spasms and cramps that can contribute to fluid retention.

remedy_recipe: Harvest dried ammi majus flowers at 30 grams and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the ground ammi majus powder with coconut oil at 100 milliliters and beeswax at 20 grams in a double boiler on low heat for 20 minutes.
Stir the mixture constantly until the beeswax melts and the temperature reaches 60 degrees celsius over the course of 15 minutes.
Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool to room temperature while stirring occasionally over a period of 30 minutes.
Pour the cooled cream into sterilized jars at 250 milliliters capacity and store them in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel creams helps with fluid retention because of its natural ability to stimulate digestion and relieve constipation. When our bodies are able to properly digest and eliminate waste, it reduces the likelihood of water being retained in the body. Additionally, fennel's diuretic properties help increase urine production, further reducing excess fluids. Seeds: The seeds of fennel are commonly used in creams due to their high oil content, which helps to absorb excess fluids and reduce swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried foeniculum vulgare leaves in late summer when essential oil content is highest.
Chop the harvested foeniculum vulgare leaves into small pieces and dry them using a food dehydrator for 2 hours.
Combine 20 grams of dried foeniculum vulgare leaves with 40 milliliters of sweet almond oil in a clean glass jar.
Steep the mixture for 2 weeks at room temperature, shaking daily to facilitate herbal extraction into the oil.
Strain the liquid through cheesecloth and discard solids before transferring the infused oil to airtight containers for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice creams helps with fluid retention because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has potent anti-inflammatory properties. Glycyrrhizin works to reduce inflammation in the body's tissues, which can contribute to water retention. By reducing inflammation, licorice creams help to alleviate symptoms of water retention, such as bloating and swelling. Additionally, licorice creams contain flavonoids, which have natural diuretic properties that help to increase urine production and remove excess fluids from the body.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Glycyrrhizin, a key component of licorice root, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help reduce swelling and alleviate fluid retention in the body.
Flavonoids: Licorice cream contains flavonoids, a class of plant compounds that have natural diuretic effects, increasing urine production and reducing excess fluid buildup in the body.

Amino acids: The amino acids present in licorice root, such as glycine and glutamic acid, help regulate sodium levels in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention by reducing excessive water absorption.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce water retention and swelling by inhibiting the production of aldosterone, a hormone that regulates sodium and water levels in the body.

Barks: The barks of the licorice plant have been used for centuries to treat fluid retention due to its diuretic properties, which help to increase urine production and eliminate excess water from the body.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 100g of glycerin and mix it with 50g of distilled water in a heat-resistant container.
Combine 20g of dried licorice root powder with 10g of vitamin e oil in a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Add the mixture from step 2 to the glycerin and water mixture, heating it gently until dissolved.
Stir in 30g of beeswax and 10g of sweet almond oil, continuing to heat until melted and well combined.
Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature before whipping with a hand mixer for 5 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Treetop hydrangea creams helps with fluid retention because of its unique combination of herbal extracts that work synergistically to reduce water retention in the body. The cream's key ingredient, treetop hydrangea, has natural diuretic properties that help to increase urine production and flush out excess fluids. Additionally, the cream's blend of herbs such as dandelion root and burdock root helps to balance the body's electrolyte levels, further reducing fluid retention and promoting overall hydration.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: The extracts of Hydrangea root and leaves have been shown to increase urine production, which can help reduce fluid retention by flushing out excess water from the body.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Hydrangea extracts have anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce swelling and edema associated with fluid retention.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in Hydrangea extracts may help protect the kidneys and other organs from damage caused by excessive fluid buildup, which can exacerbate fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Barks: The barks of Treetop Hydrangea contain compounds that help to reduce water accumulation in the body, making it effective in treating fluid retention.
Roots: The roots of this plant have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate swelling and discomfort caused by excessive fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality hydrangea arborescens leaves and flowers, ensuring freshness for optimal potency and efficacy within hours of harvest.
Combine 200g dried hydrangea arborescens herbs with 1000ml distilled water in a large glass container, allowing mixture to steep for 4 hours under shade.
Strain the liquid through cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into another clean glass container, discarding solids and retaining approximately 700ml of infused extract.
Mix the extracted liquid with 300g beeswax, 100g coconut oil, and 20g shea butter in a heat-proof bowl, gently warming the mixture over low heat for 10-15 minutes until fully incorporated.
Pour the warm mixture into clean glass jars or tins, allowing it to cool and thicken at room temperature within 30-45 minutes before using.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Juniper creams helps with fluid retention because of their natural diuretic properties. The essential oils present in juniper berries, such as cineole and bornyl acetate, stimulate the kidneys to increase urine production, effectively eliminating excess water from the body. This reduces swelling and alleviates discomfort associated with water retention. By promoting healthy circulation and kidney function, juniper creams can provide relief from bloating, edema, and other symptoms of fluid retention.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Juniper essential oil increases urine production, helping to flush out excess water and reduce swelling caused by fluid retention.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The antioxidants in juniper cream may help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to fluid retention and other health issues.

Stimulant and carminative properties: Juniper essential oil stimulates the digestive system and helps relieve bloating and gas, which can also contribute to fluid retention by reducing circulation and causing water to accumulate in the body.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of fresh juniperus communis leaves and stems and dry them in a well-ventilated area for 3 days.
Combine 20 grams of dried juniperus communis with 100ml of olive oil in a heatproof glass bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to infuse the oil with the herbal properties.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids and setting aside for later use.
Mix the strained oil with 100ml of coconut cream and 2 tablespoons of beeswax in a double boiler until the mixture thickens to a smooth consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Horehound creams helps with fluid retention because its active compounds, such as alkaloids and glycosides, have natural diuretic properties. These compounds stimulate the kidneys to release excess fluids and electrolytes from the body, reducing swelling and bloating. Antispasmodic property: Horehound's antispasmodic properties help relax the smooth muscles in the body, which can alleviate symptoms of bloating, cramps, and digestive discomfort often linked to fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots help to reduce edema and alleviate swelling associated with fluid retention.
Bark: Containing flavonoids and terpenes, bark has been traditionally used to treat water retention and improve circulation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh marrubium vulgare leaves and dry them in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Combine 20 grams of dried marrubium vulgare with 100 grams of petroleum jelly and 50 grams of coconut oil.
Mix the ingredients in a heat-resistant bowl using a double boiler method over low heat for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean glass jar, discarding the solids after 15 minutes.
Allow the cream to cool completely and thicken at room temperature for 2 hours before using.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Amur corktree creams helps with fluid retention because they contain potent anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The extract from the Amur corktree plant, also known as Phellodendron amurense, has been traditionally used to treat various health issues related to water retention, including edema and swelling. By reducing inflammation and improving blood circulation, these creams can help eliminate excess fluid buildup in the body, promoting a sense of lightness and relief from discomfort associated with fluid retention. Cardiovascular protection: Amur Corktree's flavonoids have been shown to improve cardiovascular health by dilating blood vessels and reducing blood pressure, which can contribute to fluid retention.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate fluid retention symptoms.
Barks: Rich in tannins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can aid in reducing edema and alleviating discomfort associated with fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh phellodendron amurense leaves measuring 2 tablespoons of dried or 4 tablespoons of fresh leaves.
Combine the harvested leaves with 1 cup of boiling water for 10-15 minutes allowing for infusion and extraction.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a bowl collecting the liquid extract and discarding solids.
Mix the extracted liquid with 8 ounces of distilled water and 2 tablespoons of beeswax melting them together until smooth and emulsified.
Pour the mixture into sterilized jars filling to the brim allowing it to cool set and thicken at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Beach rose creams helps with fluid retention because of its unique blend of herbs that work together to promote healthy circulation and reduce inflammation. The diuretic properties of beach rose extract help to flush out excess water and toxins from the body, while the calming effects of chamomile soothe and relax the skin. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of calendula and green tea help to reduce swelling and discomfort associated with fluid retention, leaving the skin looking smoother and more radiant.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Beach rose cream contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that stimulate urine production, helping to reduce excess water in the body and alleviate symptoms of fluid retention.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The herb's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as rosmarinic acid, help to reduce swelling and ease discomfort associated with fluid retention, making it an effective remedy for edema and bloating.

Antioxidant properties: Beach rose cream's rich antioxidant content helps protect the body from free radical damage caused by excess fluids in the tissues, which can exacerbate fluid retention and other related symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anthraquinones, which help to reduce edema and alleviate swelling associated with fluid retention.
Bark: Contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that exhibit diuretic properties, helping to increase urine production and reduce excess fluids.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh rosa rugosa hips at peak ripeness and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Combine 20 grams of dried rosa rugosa fruit with 200 milliliters of cold-pressed sweet almond oil in a heat-proof glass bowl.
Steam the mixture over boiling water for precisely 30 minutes to facilitate effective extraction.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean, sterilized glass container and discard solids after cooling to room temperature.
Whip 100 grams of cold-pressed coconut cream with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy, then gently fold in the rosa rugosa oil preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle creams helps with fluid retention because of its unique ability to stimulate liver function and promote the body's natural detoxification processes. The cream contains silymarin, a potent bioflavonoid that supports the liver's role in filtering and eliminating excess fluids from the body. By reducing fluid buildup in the bloodstream, milk thistle creams can help alleviate symptoms of water retention such as bloating, swelling, and discomfort. Regular use of these creams may also promote overall urinary health and reduce the risk of kidney stone formation.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Silymarin has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce edema (swelling) caused by fluid retention by reducing inflammation and protecting tissues from damage.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids in milk thistle cream have vasodilatory properties, which can help dilate blood vessels and improve circulation, reducing pressure on the body's tissues and allowing excess fluids to be eliminated more effectively.

Saponins: Saponins in milk thistle cream have diuretic effects, increasing urine production and promoting the elimination of excess fluids from the body, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate associated discomforts such as bloating and swelling.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain a high concentration of silymarin, which helps to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, making it effective in treating fluid retention.
Seeds: Milk thistle seeds are rich in omega-3 fatty acids, which help to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, alleviating symptoms of fluid retention.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried silybum marianum leaves and flowers in early morning for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying or air circulation method within 24 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix the powdered silybum marianum with emulsifying wax and carrier oils in a 1:3 ratio for optimal blending.
Heat the mixture at low temperature of 60°c to 70°c for 30 minutes to facilitate infusion and homogenization.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for fluid retention are topical creams that contain natural ingredients from plants, herbs, and spices to alleviate swelling and discomfort caused by excess water in the body. These creams work by promoting blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and encouraging the body to eliminate excess fluids more efficiently. Examples of herbal creams that help with fluid retention include those containing bilberry, butcher's broom, and horse chestnut extracts. By using these creams, individuals can experience relief from swollen ankles, legs, and feet, as well as reduced puffiness and discomfort.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat fluid retention with herbal creams is to look for products containing diuretic herbs like dandelion, parsley, and peppermint. These herbs help stimulate urine production, reducing water accumulation in the body. Additionally, creams with anti-inflammatory ingredients like arnica and calendula can also alleviate swelling and discomfort associated with fluid retention. Apply topical creams regularly to achieve optimal results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to fluid retention that are treated with herbal creams are cellulite, edema, and varicose veins. Herbal creams containing ingredients like horse chestnut, butcher's broom, and witch hazel help to reduce swelling, improve circulation, and strengthen vein walls. Other herbs such as ginkgo biloba and gotu kola may also be included to enhance their effectiveness in alleviating these conditions. These natural remedies provide an alternative or complement to traditional treatments for these common issues.
